---
name: Feedback / idea
about: Suggestions, UX friction or feature ideas for the alpha
title: "[Feedback] "
labels: feedback
---

**Area**
What part of the game this is about (table, units, dice, multiplayer, import, UI, …).

**Your feedback**
What works, what doesn't, what you'd change.

**Why it matters**
How it affects your play, or what problem it would solve.
